name: Public Joint-Stock Company Rosseti Moscow Region
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company "Rosseti Moscow Region", together with its subsidiaries, engages in the transmission of electricity through electrical networks primarily in Moscow, Russia. It also installs, repairs, and maintains electrical equipment; and offers technical connection services. The company was formerly known as Public Joint Stock Company √Ç¬ìMoscow United Electric Grid Company√Ç¬î and changed its name to Public Joint Stock Company √Ç¬ìRosseti Moscow Region√Ç¬î in July 2020. The company is headquartered in Moscow, Russia. Public Joint-Stock Company "Rosseti Moscow Region" operates as a subsidiary of Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company.
